lore.english:
Demon. An executive of "Kibushu" or "Oni Warrior Horde", one of the major crime syndicates in Tokyo Kingdom. Takes on the appearance of a warrior, distinguished by a long single horn protruding from the center of their forehead. An assassination maniac who boasts, “I have no interest in money. My trade is reaping lives.”

She has mastered stealth techniques such as infiltration and substitution, and her strategic sense is formidable. Hert close-quarters combat skills even surpass those of Francis, the head of the Francis Family, making her a true powerhouse. She emerges as if seeping out from empty space, cutting down her targets with a laser blade.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shade Demon Style: Shadow Illusion[-]
skills.description:
Performs a surprise attack from behind the enemy's back.
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260102]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
skills.description_readable:
Performs a surprise attack from behind the enemy's back.
If the target's [&HP] is less than 50%, performs a ([V3:1260102]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shade Demon Style: Shadow Slash[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy 3 times, leaving an afterimage.
When the character is in [&Stealth], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260203]%)[-].
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260202]%)[-] [&Weaken] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1260202]%[-] chance [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1260202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy 3 times, leaving an afterimage.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shade Demon Style: Assassinate[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy at a speed untrackable to the naked eye.
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260302]%)[-].
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]15%[-], deals [&Common_Word_Skill_DeathDmg] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:1260303]%[-].
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn].
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains a [&Stealth] [&Buff].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1260305] turn(s)

If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], Increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260401]%)[-]. 
If the character is in [&Stealth], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalDamage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1260402]%)[-].
